signals.title: Interdisciplinary Approach to Technology
signals.evidence_anchor: The applicant expresses a keen interest in blending technology with design, data, and human behavior.
signals.direct_read: The applicant values interdisciplinary learning as a core aspect of their educational aspirations.
signals.depth_opening: How this interdisciplinary interest has been applied in practice or projects, and what specific experiences have shaped this perspective.
signals.why_it_matters: Understanding this would clarify how the applicant's approach to technology is informed by diverse fields, potentially influencing their contributions in a collaborative environment.

signals.title: Empathy-Driven Leadership Experience
signals.evidence_anchor: The applicant initiated a project to support stray dogs, demonstrating leadership through empathy and community engagement.
signals.direct_read: The applicant has practical leadership experience that emphasizes listening and understanding community needs.
signals.depth_opening: The specific strategies the applicant used to engage the community and how these experiences have shaped their understanding of leadership.
signals.why_it_matters: This insight would reveal the applicant's capacity for empathetic leadership and their ability to navigate challenges in community-oriented projects.

signals.title: Strong Academic Performance with Transition Challenges
signals.evidence_anchor: The applicant has consistently high academic scores but experienced a board change between 10th and 11th grade.
signals.direct_read: The applicant's academic performance is strong, indicating capability, but the transition may have introduced new challenges.
signals.depth_opening: How the applicant navigated the transition between different educational boards and what impact it had on their academic journey.
signals.why_it_matters: Understanding this transition will provide insight into the applicant's adaptability and resilience in the face of change.

signals.title: Commitment to Extracurricular Excellence
signals.evidence_anchor: The applicant has sustained commitment to music and Olympiads over several years.
signals.direct_read: The applicant demonstrates dedication and excellence in extracurricular activities, indicating a well-rounded profile.
signals.depth_opening: The specific experiences and skills gained from these activities and how they relate to the applicant's future aspirations.
signals.why_it_matters: This understanding would highlight the applicant's time management skills and ability to balance multiple commitments effectively.

themes.title: Innovative Problem Solver with Empathetic Leadership
themes.unifying_axis: The applicant's approach to technology and leadership is characterized by a blend of creativity, empathy, and interdisciplinary thinking.
themes.interview_direction: Understanding how the applicant's experiences in technology and community engagement inform their leadership style and problem-solving abilities.

themes.title: Resilience and Adaptability in Academic and Extracurricular Pursuits
themes.unifying_axis: The applicant's academic journey reflects strong performance alongside challenges, showcasing resilience and commitment in both academics and extracurricular activities.
themes.interview_direction: Exploring how the applicant has navigated academic transitions and maintained excellence in extracurricular commitments.
